# SUSCOM Extension Experiments

## Completed extensions

- Scan-time sensitivity at 60 s / 30 s / 10 s using physically rescaled tick parameters.
- Forecast-window and horizon sensitivity from the compute-load angle on the released combined benchmark.
- Missing-sample and delayed-sample robustness using an external hold-last-sample measurement wrapper.
- Ultra-light baseline consolidation using GR, no-forecast A1, and RS already present in the released artifact.

## Not completed

- Edge-device / low-power hardware target test: no embedded target, PLC runtime, or HIL platform is present in the repository.

## Controller fixed-memory summary

| component | type | count | notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Base history ring buffer | rolling buffer | 6 | Samples needed to reproduce moving-average and trend terms |
| Forecast scratch buffer | ephemeral array | 10 | Short-horizon base forecast values |
| Previous command | persistent scalar | 1 | Used for step clipping and action hold |
| Previous mode label | persistent enum | 1 | PS / VF / PREP_CH / PREP_DIS / IDLE |
| Reserve label | persistent enum | 1 | LOW / MID / HIGH |
| Dwell counter | persistent integer | 1 | Supports bounded short action-hold logic |
